props.name: color
props.description: Color of the snowflakes (hex or CSS color)

props.name: flakeSize
props.description: Size of snowflakes in scene units

props.name: minFlakeSize
props.description: Minimum flake size in pixels on screen

props.name: pixelResolution
props.description: Pixel resolution - lower values create larger pixels for a more retro look

props.name: depthFade
props.description: Depth fade intensity - higher values make distant flakes fade faster

props.name: farPlane
props.description: Far plane distance for rendering - higher values show more distant flakes

props.name: gamma
props.description: Gamma correction value for final color output

props.name: density
props.description: Probability of snowflakes appearing (0-1) - lower values = fewer flakes
